source_pr.title: test: fix data race of Kill

symptoms: test: fix data race of Kill
failure_signature: test: fix data race of Kill
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to unsynchronized access to a shared killed flag across goroutines (a data race / memory-ordering issue). This PR stabilizes it by storing/loading the killed flag via atomic operations instead of a plain boolean.
fix_pattern: Use atomic load/store for the shared killed flag to avoid data races between the Kill path and test assertions.

evidence: evidence: test: fix data race of Kill
